name: M1 - Attributes + Gun Registration + Basic Items
objective: Implement 9 preset attributes, gun definition registry, GunData component, gun item, ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS calculation, creative tab, offhand limit, and test gun data pack for ModularShoot framework
exit_criteria: 9 preset attributes registered to BuiltInRegistries.ATTRIBUTE via DeferredRegister with base=0, ModularShootAttributes constants class available
attribute_meta metadata table established with 9 preset attribute metadata entries (default values, display info, binds)
5 framework dynamic registries (guns/plugins/plugin_types/traits/states) + attribute_meta registered via DataPackRegistryEvent.NewRegistry
GunData Data Component defined and registered with Codec serialization (GunData record + PluginInstance record)
modularshoot:gun item registered with max stack 1, fire resistant, no enchantment
Gun registry API (Java + data pack JSON loading) functional
ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS component calculation and write logic completed (gun base values only, no plugins)
Creative mode tab modularshoot registered, gun variants retrievable from tab
Offhand restriction enforced (gun placed in offhand slot is forced to drop)
Test gun JSON data pack created
Project compiles successfully (gradle build / compileJava no errors)
Verification: holding test gun shows framework attribute values via /attribute command; creative tab provides gun; offhand placement triggers drop
